mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL levels erode real corporate profit margins and force discount rate adjustments, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during CPIAUCSL uptrends are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE exceeds 5.0 percent, consumer spending capacity contracts sharply, triggering earnings downgrades and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or out-of-sample accuracy drops below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in RSAFS and HOUST signals a synchronized collapse in consumer credit and housing demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint decline in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict negative 60d returns with statistical significance (p > 0.05) in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: During late-cycle expansions, rising INDPRO indicates robust manufacturing output that supports corporate revenue growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 5d returns during late-cycle expansions show no statistical edge over random chance, or Rank IC turns negative in this regime.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS falls below 2.5 percent, liquidity conditions improve and borrowing costs decline, compressing equity discount rates and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns during sub-2.5% rate environments are not significantly higher than baseline, or signal accuracy falls below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where PAYEMS declines while UNRATE rises indicates structural labor market deterioration, forecasting negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The PAYEMS-UNRATE divergence fails to generate negative 60d returns with p < 0.05 significance in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Declining GDPC1 growth rates reflect weakening aggregate demand that reduces corporate earnings expectations, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for GDPC1 declines remains below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows, or 20d returns do not correlate negatively with GDP growth.

mechanism_narrative: In recession onset regimes, INDPRO falling below 105 signals severe industrial contraction that accelerates equity sell-offs, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Negative 5d returns during recession onset regimes show no predictive power, or signal accuracy drops below 45% in walk-forward validation.
